title: consolidate legacy tracking views into central ticket dashboard
description:
## Summary
- Consolidated bug and tracking views into a central tickets.v_central_dashboard view.
- Rebuilt legacy views in bachelorprojekt schema as backward-compatible wrappers.
- Ticket T000379 consolidated.

## Test plan
- Validated via SQL queries on v_open_issues and v_timeline.
- Verified column shapes preserve existing API/UI requirements.

Closes T000379
